lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Hey there, buddy. You're an outerlander, huh? I'm not really supposed to talk to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: I dunno buddy. Some stupid tradition or other. We're always told not to talk to outerlanders unless the Chieftain has allowed it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The Chieftain? Who is that?

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: His names Brundt, buddy. He's a real boring guy. You can find him in the longhall there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you take me to see him?

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Sorry buddy, I'm not allowed into the Longhall. Don't worry, he's easy to spot. He's the one in the fancy helmet. Oh, and he only has one eye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He's a cyclops?

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Nah, nah, nah... He just wears an eyepatch! Well, see ya around buddy!

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Hey buddy, I'll trade ya that for some food! Ya interested?

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Okay buddy, suit yerself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Hey there, buddy. You're an outerlander, huh?

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Didn't think old Jarvald would let an outerlander come kill dagger-mouths with him!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, obviously he did. So what are you doing up here?

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Well buddy, let me tell you, killing those dagger-mouths is sure thirsty work!

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: If you got a keg of beer on you I'll buy it off ya for 500 gold coins, buddy!

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Or if you got any animal parts, I'll trade ya something for 'em!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No... I don't have anything like that with me...

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Well, I'm not going back down there until I get a drink buddy! Come see me if you find me a keg, I pay good money!

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Wanna sell me ya kegs of beer for 500 gold coins each outerlander?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know... Seems a little off to sell alcohol to a child...

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Hey, don't judge our customs outerlander! Now you want the cash or you want to bug me?

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: You wanna sell me the lot buddy, or one at a time?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I don't have any kegs of beer to sell...

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: I'll trade ya animal parts for cooked tuna, ya interested outerlander?

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: You wanna trade me the lot buddy, or just one type?

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: What ya selling buddy?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No offence Askeladden, and it's not that I don't trust you... Er, actually it is that I don't trust you.

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Aw, buddy... What did I ever do to you?

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Well, if ya change your mind, I'm gonna be here waiting for a drink, buddy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again Askeladden.

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Hey buddy! That ain't my name no more! My new Fremennik name is Larravak! What's yours?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: My Fremennik name is [Fremennik name].

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Ha! Ain't as good as my name buddy! So what can I do ya for?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, Askeladd- sorry, Larravak; What is there to do around here now that we are both Fremenniks?

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: I guess you could do a bit of shopping. We got fresh fish at the docks, and some armour and weapons at Skulgrimen's place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have another pet rock?

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Sure thing, but you'd better free up some space first.

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Sure thing buddy! I'd say take better care of this one, but it's just a rock! I have hundreds of them! Go wild!

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Sure, have as many as you like. I've plenty more!

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Hey buddy, I'll trade ya that for some food! Ya interested?

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Okay buddy, suit yerself!

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Hi buddy! Or do ya want me to call ya [Fremennik name] now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Askeladden, what on Gielinor are you doing up here? And by the way, the name is [player name].

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Sure thing, buddy!

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: I was down in that cave killing dagger-mouths! It was fun! But then I got thirsty, so came up here for a bit of a rest...

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Hey buddy, I'll tell you what, if you got any kegs of beer on ya, I'll buy them off ya for 700 gold coins each!

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: If ya found any animal parts killing dagger-mouths I'll trade ya for them too!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No... I don't have anything like that with me...

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Well, I'm not going back down there until I get a drink buddy! Come see me if you find me a keg, I pay good money!

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Wanna sell me kegs of beer for 700 gold coins each buddy?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Um... Aren't you a little... ...young to be drinking so much?

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Hey, don't talk to me like that buddy! I've done all the trials you have and I'm just as mucha Fremennik as you are!

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Now are ya gonna sell me some beer, or are you going to cry about it all day?

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: You wanna sell me the lot buddy, or one at a time?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I don't have any kegs of beer to sell...

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: I'll trade ya animal parts for cooked lobsters if ya interested buddy!

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: You wanna trade me the lot buddy, or just one type?

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: What ya selling buddy?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No offence Askeladden, and it's not that I don't trust you... Er, actually it is that I don't trust you.

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Aw, buddy... What did I ever do to you?

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Well, if ya change your mind, I'm gonna be here waiting for a drink, buddy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have another pet rock? I lost mine...

lines.speaker: Askeladden
lines.text: Well it's sure a weird place to ask for it buddy, but I have hundreds of them! Go wild!
